connect_hint: Scan QR or open the URL on another device
folder_path_hint_local: Browse or type a local path
server_start_hint: Go to the Server tab to start it.
invalid_port: Port must be a number between 1024 and 65535
path_not_found: Path not found or not accessible
language_restart_hint: A restart is required for the language change to take effect.
settings_server_running_hint: Stop the server before changing settings.
about_description: LanHopper is a lightweight desktop app for sharing files across devices on your local network. Start a secure session, share a folder, and let others browse and download your files — no internet required, no accounts, no setup.
open_source_desc: LanHopper is free and open source software. You can inspect the code, report issues, or contribute on GitHub.
privacy_desc: LanHopper does not collect, transmit, or store any personal data. Everything stays on your local network. No telemetry, no analytics, no external servers — ever.
no_limit_warning: Without a size limit, very large files may be corrupted depending on your hardware and LAN stability.
kill_success: Process terminated. Port {port} is now free.
kill_error_permission: Permission denied. Try running the app as administrator.
quote_error: Oops! Looks like there's no connection.
